summary: Round 1 test GREEN, all hands-on run live (nothing blocked, tmux present). Go suite gofmt/vet/test-race clean incl. 5 named regression tests (TestSweepTargetedOnlyNamedSlug, TestSweepSparesSelf, TestSweepReapsOrphansAndTerminal, TestSweepDryRunKillsNothing, TestSkillsBashNoUnsafeRm). Safe scratch-tmux harness proved targeted `gogo sweep <slug>` reaps only its own driving session while sparing a concurrent different-feature gogo-done host + all 3 real host sessions (live REV-002 fix proof); --dry-run kills nothing; self-guard live-demoed from inside the host; FR4 remain-on-exit removal confirmed by grep + live pane-close demo; whole-board tested via --dry-run only (host-global safety). Artifacts conform; `sweep --help` + invalid-slug rejection (exit 1) match parsing. Two minor DOC-only findings, both resolved without code change: TEST-001 (plan.md reconciled to as-built D4=B) fixed; TEST-002 (pre-existing events.jsonl chronology nit, out of scope) wontfix. 0 open issues -> advance to report.
